Title: Enacts the "stopping abuse and fraud enabled by (SAFE) platforms act"
Summary: Enacts the "stopping abuse and fraud enabled by (SAFE) platforms act"; requires a mechanism for users to report fraudulent content; prohibits platforms recommending, promoting, curating, prioritizing, or displaying fraudulent content for delivery to a user if it knows or has reason to know that the content is fraudulent.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to enacting the "SAFE platforms act"
